'''''Shmus''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was supposed to rendezvous with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], but was destroyed by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]]
